publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-03-18 23:59:26 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Approximately 50 posters and other ephemera representing leaders and heroes of the Indian subcontinent.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Approximately 50 posters and other ephemera representing leaders and heroes of the Indian subcontinent.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: India political posters, #8710. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Lithographs have been a conspicuous feature of South Asian visual culture from the 19th century on. They have served devotional, pedagogical, political, and decorative purposes in many or most Indian homes and offices. This collection of political posters centers on heroes of the Indian Independence movement.

controlaccess.subject: National liberation movements -- India -- History -- 20th century
Revolutionaries -- India -- History -- 20th century
